data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: Bitcoin recovers above $68,000 after death of Iranian leader
data.description: Bitcoin surges past $68,000 following the death of Iran's supreme leader, amid geopolitical tensions and market recovery.
data.content: Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies rebounded sharply in early Asia trading on Sunday after Iran confirmed that the countrys supreme leader had been killed during a military campaign by the US and Isr… [+3275 chars]
